about.title: About Versions for the People
about.what_text: Versions for the People tracks changes to Israeli government open datasets on data.gov.il. When a dataset is updated, the system saves the previous version so you can see what changed over time.
about.why_text: Government datasets are updated by overwriting existing data — once new data is published, the old data is gone. This project preserves the history for transparency and accountability.
about.how_text: The system polls data.gov.il on a configurable schedule, detects changes, and stores the data in the Datastore on odata.org.il so it can be queried via API.
